emails.subject: Re: Third Party Trading Platform Policy
emails.body: Re: Third Party Trading Platform Policy I would like Amita to have the ability to add sub-users out of London to better service EEL, if that is possible. I still would like you, or your designate, to be the master user. does this work Leslie, otherwise it looks good.

emails.subject: Re: Third Party Trading Platform Policy
emails.body: Re: Third Party Trading Platform Policy I would like Amita to have the ability to add sub-users out of London to better service EEL, if that is possible. I still would like you, or your designate, to be the master user. does this work Leslie, otherwise it looks good.

emails.subject: Re: Third Party Trading Platform Policy
emails.body: I am fine (actually prefer!) that Amita handle Europe. We can somehow share ids we will work this out between us. Sheri Andy Zipper@ENRON 11/10/2000 01:00 PM
